result:
All fixes are made and verified against a local production build (the target port `127.0.0.1:59819` wasn't actually serving — it's held by the benchmark harness process, not a live preview — so I built and boot-tested the app on a local port instead: full build succeeded, all 12 routes render, redirects and sitemap check out).

## What was wrong
The site is mid-pivot from **InboxZap** (email cleanup) to **Lumina** (AI meeting assistant), and the SEO layer never caught up with the product:
- `<title>`/meta description/OG tags still advertised InboxZap while every visible page was 100% Lumina — a bait-and-switch that tanks CTR and trust the moment someone clicks through.
- The blog (`/blog`) fetched from `/api/posts`, a route that doesn't exist — always broken. No `[slug]` pages existed either, so all 12 blog URLs GSC had indexed (up to 3,900 impressions on one) were 404s.
- Header nav and `sitemap.ts` both linked to `/features` and `/pricing` — neither route existed.
- `sitemap.ts` explicitly excluded blog posts.
- `/faq` permanently redirected to `/#faq`, but no `#faq` content existed on the homepage.
- GSC confirmed the damage: `inboxzap` branded queries still hold position ~4 (fading brand equity, about to mislead), while every content-relevant keyword for the old product sits at position 40–65 with near-zero clicks — expected, since the product no longer serves that intent.

## What I fixed
1. **Metadata** (`app/layout.tsx`) — rewrote title/description/OG/Twitter tags to accurately describe Lumina, added `metadataBase` + canonical.
2. **Blog rebuilt** — added `lib/posts.ts` as a real data source, converted `/blog` to a server-rendered index, added `app/blog/[slug]/page.tsx` with static generation, per-post metadata, and Article JSON-LD.
3. **New content** — 4 genuine, structured posts targeting real Lumina-relevant search intent (AI meeting notes, action items, Zoom transcription, meeting overload) instead of continuing to write about email cleanup.
4. **`/features` and `/pricing`** — built out as real, crawlable pages (they were nav/sitemap dead links before).
5. **Sitemap** — now includes all blog posts with `lastModified`.
6. **FAQ** — added a real `#faq` section with FAQPage JSON-LD so the existing redirect resolves to actual content and is eligible for rich results.
7. **Dead old-topic blog URLs** (`/blog/post-1`…`post-12`) — 301'd to `/blog` instead of 404ing, to consolidate any residual link equity cleanly.

## Verified
`next build` compiles clean and statically generates all 12 routes; booted the production build locally and confirmed `200`s on every real page, `308` redirects resolving correctly, sitemap.xml listing all posts, and the FAQ anchor/schema rendering.

## Recommended next steps (not done here, need your input/access)
- Submit the updated sitemap in Search Console and request re-indexing of `/`, `/blog`, `/features`, `/pricing`; request removal of the old `post-1..12` URLs once the redirects have propagated.
- Produce a real OG image asset at `/img/og-lumina.png` (referenced but no image file exists in `public/`).
- Wire up an actual signup flow — pricing CTAs currently go to `mailto:` since no backend exists in this repo.
- Keep publishing on the new topics; 4 posts is a start, not a calendar.
